title: Engraved Netherite Upgrade
description: Changes the texture of the Netherite Upgrade.
body:
Engraved Netherite Upgrade is a resource pack for Minecraft: Java Edition that changes the icon of the Netherite Upgrade found in bastions to the one on the resource pack icon and gallery image.

**Notes:**

* This resource pack requires the Update 1.20 experiments to be enabled, as the item will not appear in vanilla unless Update 1.20 experiments are enabled.
